Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ConnectedApplication

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ConnectedApplication
public class ConnectedApplication extends SObject

Java class for ConnectedApplication complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ConnectedApplication">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ConnAppPluginClassId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactPhone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExecutionUserId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IconUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InfoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LogoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MobileSessionTimeout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MobileStartUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamedUserUvidTimeout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsAllowAdminApprovedUsersOnly" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsAppIssueJwtTokenEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsCodeCredentialGuestEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsFullContentPushNotifications" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsHasSessionLevelPolicy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsIsInternal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsRefreshTokenValidityMetric" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PinLength" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RefreshTokenValidityPeriod" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SamlLoginInformation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionPolicyAction" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionTimeout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UvidTimeout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Version" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

      value - allowed object is String

    • getVersion
